# Gaussian Elimination

**Summary**: A direct method for solving systems of linear equations by eliminating variables.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] evaluated various forms of Gaussian elimination, including D4 and STBAND orderings, to determine computational efficiency.

## Key Results and Findings

- The D4-Gaussian Elimination method was the most efficient of the direct methods. ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 21]])
